sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine / பெயர்ச்சொல் (பெண்பால்)
2. a fabric colored with the purple dye, a garment made from purple cloth
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Of Latin origin; the “purple” mussel, that is, (by implication) the red blue color itself, and finally, a garment dyed with it: - purple.
